member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.Inventor.AiApplication.#ctor(Inventor.Application,System.Action{Xarial.XCad.Inventor.AiApplication})
member.summary: Only to be used within SwAddInEx

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.Inventor.AiApplicationFactory.PreCreate
member.summary: Pre-creates a template for Inventor application

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.Inventor.AiApplicationFactory.FromProcess(System.Diagnostics.Process)
member.summary: Creates instance of Inventor from Inventor.exe process

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.Inventor.AiApplicationFactory.Create(System.Nullable{Xarial.XCad.Inventor.Enums.AiVersion_e},Xarial.XCad.Enums.ApplicationState_e,Xarial.XCad.Inventor.Enums.StartApplicationConnectStrategy_e,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Version or null for the latest

member.name: M:Xarial.XCad.Inventor.AiApplicationFactory.CreateVersion(Xarial.XCad.Inventor.Enums.AiVersion_e)
member.summary: Creates instance of Inventor version from the major version

member.name: T:Xarial.XCad.Inventor.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.Inventor.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.Inventor.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Xarial.XCad.Inventor.Properties.Resources.XCadAppToken
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Byte[].
